'''Rana''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Known to be a noted [[Jedi ace|pilot]], Rana became a member of the [[Jedi Starfighter Corps]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, Rana was delivered to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and began to [[Jedi training/Legends|learn]] the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]]. A [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|student]] at the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]], Rana went on to [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduate]] and was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] apprentice by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. After years of one-on-one travel and study, Rana was ready to face the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]; which she passed, ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. As a Knight, Rana pursued the path of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]] as part of her independent study focus. Specializing as a [[Jedi ace|ace pilot]], Rana joined the [[Jedi Starfighter Corps|Starfighter Corps]] and became a noted member amongst its ranks.<ref name="SWJS" />

In [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]], Rana was still flying out of the Coruscant Temple on missions for the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. At one point, Rana carried fellow Jedi [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] as passengers, leaving them on the isolated world of [[Ragoon VI]] where they hoped to deal with the growing distance they felt between one another out in the wilderness.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]''</ref> Two decades later, Rana was still an active member of the Starfighter Corps, piloting one of the Order's new [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite'']] interceptors. Stationed at the Temple during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Rana answered [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] rallying cry and followed him to the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] as part of a massive [[Jedi assault team/Legends|rescue team]] to save Jedi Kenobi, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from execution by the [[Separatist Council/Legends|Separatist Council]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. While many of her comrades stormed the [[Petranaki arena]] on the ground, Rana joined the [[Battle of Geonosis (disambiguation)|battle]] in orbit under the leadership of Jedi Councilor [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]].<ref name="SWJS" />
